---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused enhancement for Spark AI Hub
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Provide a concise description of the requested feature.

## Problem Statement

What limitation or user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the expected behavior, UX, API, or workflow.

## Scope

Affected areas:

- [ ] Backend (`daemon/`)
- [ ] Frontend (`frontend/`)
- [ ] Recipe registry (`registry/recipes/`)
- [ ] Installer or runtime scripts
- [ ] Documentation

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds.

## Compatibility and Risk

Note any possible impact on:

- installation flow
- existing recipes
- API compatibility
- Windows or shell scripts
- Docker runtime behavior
- licensing or third-party dependencies

## Validation Plan

Describe how the change should be verified.

## Additional Context

Add links, mockups, screenshots, or references if relevant.
